summary: M5-WEB-WINDOWS-DISTRIBUTABLE-001 is CLOSED only after PR #120 passed CI, merged into main, local main synchronized to origin/main, and active release/security/QA child threads were closed. The integrated branch adds local/smoke-only Web and unsigned Windows distributable evidence with a MONSOON_SMOKE_WEB test entry and packaged M5 smoke script. Import/export button count 0 remains an accepted caveat: current desktop exposes no file import/export IPC, and this task proves client-session save/load checkpoint behavior only.

tests_run.result: Quality, Web, and Browser Smoke passed in 1m52s; Windows Desktop Smoke Artifact passed in 56s.
Merged PR #120 and fast-forwarded local main to b173c980e02e3d2365fdb4d022c7c4392918cca9.

tests_run.command: git rev-parse HEAD && git rev-parse origin/main
tests_run.result: Local main and origin/main both resolve to b173c980e02e3d2365fdb4d022c7c4392918cca9 before closure branch edits.
All active task child threads returned completed previous_status and were closed.

decisions: Mark M5-WEB-WINDOWS-DISTRIBUTABLE-001 CLOSED because accepted implementation and review evidence are integrated into origin/main via PR #120.
Keep M5 formal passage out of scope; this is task-level closure only.
Carry the current-surface caveat forward: no desktop file import/export bridge is proven or accepted by this task.
risks: P3 caveat: current task covers client-session save/load checkpoint only, not future desktop file import/export UX or file-system adapter behavior.
P3 caveat: MONSOON_SMOKE_WEB is an evidence switch; any future default desktop launch into M5 web UI requires separate task/review.
requested_action: Commit closure, open closure PR, wait for CI, merge into main, then select the next READY M5 task or Human Gate task according to taskctl ready.
